description_long: This is a purple bubble tea cup with a wide, straight pink straw inserted through the top. The cup features a printed logo of a stylized animal, possibly a wolf or dog, in white on the front, with the brand name 'Boba' visible on a band wrapping around the lower portion. The cup is filled with a purple beverage and contains a cluster of black tapioca pearls settled at the bottom. The lid is flat and appears to be made of plastic, with a central opening for the straw. The cup itself is semi-translucent, allowing the beverage and pearls to be partially visible through the material.
description: A purple bubble tea cup with a pink straw, visible logo, and black tapioca pearls at the bottom. The cup is semi-translucent and features a flat plastic lid.
description_view_0: Front view showing the logo, brand name, and tapioca pearls clearly, with the pink straw centered.
description_view_1: Side view with the logo partially visible and the pearls still apparent at the bottom.
description_view_2: Rear view with no visible logo or branding, only the purple cup and pearls at the bottom.
description_view_3: Angled side view with a partial glimpse of the logo and the band, pearls still visible.
attribute_straw_type: plastic, wide, straight, pink, no distinctive pattern, typical for bubble tea
attribute_cup_lid_style: flat plastic lid with a central straw slot
attribute_cup_branding_or_logo: White stylized animal logo and 'Boba' text on a gray band near the bottom front of the cup
